items.title: DRI cracks down on organised gold smuggling and illegal melting racket operating in Delhi and Kolkata; gold, silver and cash worth ₹14.13 crore seized; six persons arrested
items.snippet: Press Release:Press Information Bureau Ministry of Finance DRI cracks down on organised gold smuggling and illegal melting racket operating in Delhi and Kolkata; gold, silver and cash worth ₹14.13 crore seized; six persons arrested Posted On: 15 MAR 2026 10:59AM by PIB Delhi The Directorate of Revenue Intelligence (DRI) has unearthed an organised syndicate involved in the smuggling of foreign-origin gold into India, …
